top_signals.title: US extends Russian oil waiver in attempt to lower fuel prices
top_signals.summary: Thirty-day licence comes as American voters become frustrated at high cost of petrol and diesel
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Delta to Prioritize Global Expansion Over Domestic Transactions
top_signals.summary: Delta Air Lines Inc. Chief Executive Officer Ed Bastian said he’ll sit out consolidation in the US aviation market and instead focus on expanding abroad through partnerships, even as high fuel prices and a transaction-minded administration stand to shake up the domestic industry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
